title: Open Org profile
description: An organisation's profile in the Open Org schema — identity, mission, governance, themes, strategy summary, and idea count. See https://openorg.good-ship.co.uk for context.

linked_schemas.title: Linked Schemas
linked_schemas.description: Identifies the schemas the profile is published against.

geolocation.title: Geolocation
geolocation.description: Latitude/longitude of the organisation's primary operating area.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Open Org theme keys describing what the organisation does. Drawn from the Open Org controlled vocabulary of 30 themes.

primary_area.title: Primary area
primary_area.description: Human-readable name of the organisation's primary operating area.

primary_area_code.title: Primary area code
primary_area_code.description: ONS LAD/ITL code of the primary operating area.

strategy_themes.title: Strategy themes
strategy_themes.description: Themes from the organisation's published active strategies, if any.

ideas_count.title: Published ideas count
ideas_count.description: Number of published ideas associated with this organisation.

open_org_profile_url.title: Open Org profile URL
open_org_profile_url.description: URL of the full Open Org profile JSON, served by the organisation's host (e.g. llmstxt.social or openorg.good-ship.co.uk).

schema_version.title: Open Org schema version
schema_version.description: Version of the Open Org schema this profile complies with.

schema.name: open_org_profile-v0.1.0
schema.purpose: Federated discovery of UK social-sector organisations publishing Open Org profiles. Funders, researchers, and peer organisations can find each other by theme and place.
